title: [BUG] Export CSV garbled characters
author: jingwuluo
body: When emoji is included in worksheet.columns, the encoding format of the exported CSV file will not be the specified encoding format

comments.author: jingwuluo
comments.body:
I looked at the source code and found that when using the csv.writeBuffer() method, the parameter encoding has no effect.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/30119218/93994062-0c4bd300-fdc2-11ea-844b-865d4829b851.png)
